title: Fix client folder access to show details, interventions, and photos

requirements.summary: Fix the client folder navigation so that clicking on a client folder properly displays the client details page with coordinates, interventions, and photos
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking on a client folder navigates to the client dossier page
Client coordinates are visible on the dossier page
Client interventions list is displayed and accessible
Client photos and media are visible in the interventions section

file_operations.description: Fix the navigation link for client folders to properly route to the ClientDossierPage with the correct client ID parameter. Ensure the Card or link element uses the router's Link component or navigate function with the correct route path format (/clients/:clientId). Verify that the client.info.name is being used as a clickable element that triggers navigation.

Verify the route definition for the client dossier page uses the correct path pattern (/clients/:clientId or similar) and that the route is properly registered in the router configuration. Ensure the clientId parameter is correctly defined in the route.

requirements.summary: Verify that the routing from the clients list page to the ClientDossierPage is working correctly with proper client ID parameter passing
acceptanceCriteria: Client ID is correctly passed through the route parameters
ClientDossierPage receives and uses the client ID to fetch data
No console errors related to routing or parameter extraction

file_operations.description: Ensure the component correctly extracts the clientId from route parameters using TanStack Router's useParams hook or similar mechanism. Verify the clientId is being passed to the useQuery hook for fetching client data and to the InterventionList component as a prop. Add error handling for missing or invalid clientId parameters.

Review the route configuration to ensure the client dossier route properly defines the clientId parameter and that it matches the navigation pattern used in ClientsPage. Confirm the route component is correctly set to ClientDossierPage.

requirements.summary: Ensure the ClientDossierPage properly displays all client information sections including contact details, interventions list with photos, and blacklist panel
acceptanceCriteria: Client name, address, city, state, zip code are displayed
Phone and email are shown if available
InterventionList component renders and displays all interventions
Media/photos attached to interventions are visible

file_operations.description: Verify that all client information fields (name, address.street, address.city, address.state, address.zip, phone, email) are being rendered in the UI. Ensure the InterventionList component is properly instantiated with the clientId prop. Confirm the BlacklistPanel component is included and receives the necessary client data. Add proper conditional rendering for optional fields like phone and email.

Ensure the component correctly fetches interventions using the clientId prop and renders each intervention with its associated media. Verify that the MediaPreview component or similar is being used to display intervention photos. Confirm that intervention details including date, comments, and media are all accessible and visible in the list.

Verify the component receives and displays client blacklist information including blacklist comments and media. Ensure the component properly handles both blacklisted and non-blacklisted states and displays the appropriate UI for each case.
